---
title: "Monday Hackday at ESIP Summer Meeting: 'Making Things easier for scientists'"
description: "Please save the date! Plan to arrive in Austin for Monday afternoon."
author:
  - name: Openscapes
  - name: NASA Openscapes Mentors
#    url: {}
date: "2026-07-27"
categories: [event, nasa-framework]
image: 
---

*Cross-posted at [openscapes.org/events](https://openscapes.org/events), [nasa-openscapes.github.io/news](https://nasa-openscapes.github.io/news.html)*

------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Please save the date! Plan to arrive in Austin for Monday afternoon

Please save the date! Plan to arrive in Austin for Monday afternoon. "Hackday" to our NASA Openscapes and earthaccess communities means we will be collaboratively problem-solving and strategizing, and translating ideas into action, which includes decisions, code, and documentation.

**Purpose:** to gather anyone interested who's going to ESIP, and hack on "making things easier for scientists": STAC, virtulizarr, earthaccess (What would a single query look like for differnt agencies i.e. lemon and oranges), point-collocation between data sets...
**Outcomes:** to connect interested folks and strengthen the community, to move forward on decisions and ideas
**Process:** light agenda, building from recent events like [earthaccess December 15 Hackday online and in New Orleans](https://openscapes.org/events/2025-12-15-earthaccess-hackday/). Below are the starting details, please check back for more details as we get closer! We will have a way to contribute ideas ahead of the event, likely as a Google Doc or GitHub repo. 

- **Date**: Monday, July 27, 2026 
- **Times**: 1-6pm local Austin time (Central Time)
-  **Where**: in person at the ESIP meeting hotel (<https://2026julyesipmeeting.sched.com>)
- **Who**: Folks interested in working together across the ESIP community and contributing to "making things easier for scientists" from policy, social and technical perspectives
- **Cost**: Free. The space is generously provided by ESIP and coordinated by the Openscapes community.


![](TODO){fig-alt="left to right: purple background with white text reading Openscapes earthaccess Hackday with dates, times, and logos of CNG, earthaccess, Openscapes, and ESIP" fig-align="center" width="319"}
